\tzpentry{ID4868}{Addr Displacement Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4868 introduces Addr Displacement Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$D_{addr} = \\lceil \\log_2(153,600) \\rceil \\approx 17.23 \\to 18 \\text{ bits}$
\]
